_comment: Single source of truth for model routing. Change provider/model here — swarm follows.
_note: Command-level model routing in infra/telegram-bot/bot.py loads from this file at startup. Swarm inherits these roles when orchestration layer is active.

_roles.orchestrator: Opus 4.6 — top-level planning, PR management, complex reasoning
_roles.worker: Opus 4.6 — content drafting (articles, batch); quality over speed
_roles.analyst: Haiku 4.5 — keyword research, SEO, SERP lookups; speed over depth
_roles.reviewer: Sonnet 4.6 — post-mortems, session analysis, what-went-wrong reasoning
_roles.technician: Sonnet 4.6 — maintenance sub-agent; safety rules require reliable instruction-following

token_caps._standard: 2x human tokens per role. Human baseline = tokens a skilled human would use to solve the same task.

cmd_routing._comment: Maps Telegram bot commands to swarm routing entries. bot.py loads this at startup.

_technician_note: infra role = orchestrator-initiated infra tasks; technician role = delegated sub-agent for config/maintenance. Technician sits below orchestrator in the delegation chain.
